title: How to Get a Police Certificate – Bahrain - Canada.ca
content:
## How to Get a Police Certificate – Bahrain
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.
Do I need to provide a Police Certificate with my Application for Permanent Residence? No.
Citizenship and Immigration Canada will send you a letter requesting a police certificate after you send your Application for Permanent Residence. You must bring that letter when you apply for a Police Certificate.
Name of document(s) to get: Good Conduct Certificate

## How to get a Police Certificate:

### If you are a citizen of Bahrain:

#### If you live in Bahrain
You must apply in person at the Criminal Investigation Directorate (CID) ( see Special notes and considerations for complete address ) and bring:
- The letter from the Embassy of Canada requesting the Good Conduct Certificate
- Your completed Good Conduct Certificate application form (PS/CID/30) (You can get an application form from the CID)
- A copy of your ID card/CPR
- A full set of fingerprints taken by your local police authority
- 3 photographs (4x5 cm) with white background

#### If you live outside of Bahrain:
- Return to Bahrain and apply in person OR ask a representative (a friend, relative or colleague) in Bahrain, with a power of attorney, to apply on your behalf at the Criminal Investigation Directorate (CID) and follow the instructions above.
- Visit your nearest Embassy of Bahrain and bring: A copy of your passport A copy of your ID card/CPR 3 photographs (4x5 cm) with white background Applicable fees
- A copy of your passport
- A copy of your ID card/CPR
- 3 photographs (4x5 cm) with white background
Note: You will be given a form to take to the police department for fingerprints

### If you are not a citizen of Bahrain:

#### If you live in Bahrain: (for more than 6 months)
You must apply in person at the Criminal Investigation Directorate (CID) (see Special notes and considerations for complete address) and bring:
- The letter from the Embassy of Canada requesting the Good Conduct Certificate
- Your completed Good Conduct Certificate application form (PS/CID/30) (You can get an application form from the CID)
- A copy of pages 1-4 of your passport
- A copy of all previous Bahraini resident permits
- A full set of fingerprints taken by your local police authority
- 3 photographs (4x5 cm) with white background

#### If you live outside of Bahrain: (but have lived in Bahrain for more than 6 months)
- Return to Bahrain and apply in person OR ask a representative (a friend, relative or colleague) in Bahrain, with a power of attorney, to apply on your behalf at the Criminal Investigation Directorate (CID) and follow the instructions above.
- Visit your nearest Embassy of Bahrain and bring: A copy of the passport that you used in Bahrain A copy of your old or expired resident visa for Bahrain A copy of your current passport A copy of your current valid residence permit 3 photographs (4x5 cm) with white background Applicable fees
- A copy of the passport that you used in Bahrain
- A copy of your old or expired resident visa for Bahrain
- A copy of your current passport
- A copy of your current valid residence permit
- 3 photographs (4x5 cm) with white background
Note: You will be given a form to take to the police department for fingerprints.

### Information and documents you need:
- Please see above for specifics
- Or contact the Criminal Investigation Directorate on their email: crinf@moipolice.bh
- Or call their customer service center on Telephone: 0097317718888.

### Special notes and considerations
Criminal Investigation Directorate (CID) P.O. Box 26698, Manama State of Bahrain Location: Al Adlia Area
